nasb.text: because on account of him many of the Jews were going away and were believing in Jesus.

esv.text: because on account of him many of the Jews were going away and believing in Jesus.

cnv.text: 因為有許多猶太人為了拉撒路的緣故，離開他們，信了耶穌。

ccb.text: 因为有许多犹太人因为拉撒路的缘故离开他们，去信了耶稣。

csbs.text: 因为有许多犹太人为了拉撒路的缘故，离开他们，信了耶稣。
